todos.content: Read relevant tavily skill files to confirm web_agent use (completed)

Call web_agent to scrape Parliament of Sri Lanka current MPs directory and extract name, party, phone number, date of birth, religion for first 50 profiles; save deliverables under /_outputs/parliament_task_output/ (in_progress)
Render the specialist output files for the user to view (pending)
Check Tavily CLI status (tvly --status) to ensure authenticated
Find the Parliament of Sri Lanka MPs directory page and list URLs (use tvly map/search)
Extract the first 50 MP profile URLs and scrape required fields using tvly extract/crawl
Generate CSV, Markdown, JSON, and sources.txt under /_outputs/parliament_task_output/
Deliver file paths and one-line summary to user
